titleStmt.title: SII 24.124: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 124. (A.R. No. 55 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of land after purchase, for a flower garden to the temple, by three private individuals who also made additional gifts of money for the maintainance of five gardeners. The land is said to have been purchased by the donors from the temple itself. The details of the date viz. 11th year, Siṁha, ba. 14 Wednesday, Āyilyam correspond to A.D., 1143, August 11, Wednesday; ·57; ·45.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmanṉu patumam pūtta veḻulakun tāmuṉ ceytavattāṟ paruti neṭumālivaneṉac cuṭarmuṭicūṭi Irunilamakaḷai Urimaiyiṟ puṇarntu tirumakaḷ paṇaimulai ceñcāntaḷaintu parumaṇimārvum paruvarai nikaṟpa jayamakaḷ ceḻuñ cāntaṇac cuvaṭṭāṟ puyamiru kayilaip poruppenat toṉṟi nāmakaḷ tāṉuṅ komakaṉ ce
vvāyp pavaḷac ceyoḷi paṭaittana niyāneṉa tavaḷa naṉ niṟat tiruttuṭaiy yenavun pukaḻ makaḷ cintaiyai makiḻunāḷilum Oru kuṭai veyilinuṅ karuṅkali Iruniḷait turappa niṭu pallūḻi Eḻkaṭal puṟattiṉuṅ koṭāc centanik kolinitulāva miṉamuñ cilaiyum citaintu vāṉuyarp poṉṉeṭu meruviṟ poli viṟṟiruppa Umpar yāṉaiyor reṭṭinukkum
tampameṉnat tanittani ticaitoṟum vicaiya(jaya) stampa niṟpa paci pakaiyānatu titu niṅka mannuyir taḻaippa manuvāṟu viḷaṅka mātavar tavamum maṅkaiyar kaṟpum Āti yan=taṇar Ākutikkanalum miyteḻu koṇṭal vicun taṇ puṉalum metini vaḷaruñ cāti yoḻukkamum nīti yaṟamum piṟaḻātu nikaḻap puravum paḻanaṟparappumallatu vaṉṟaḷaip paṭutal kaṉaviluṅ
kāṇṭaṟ kariteṉa varunati puṭaiyilum palveṟu puḷḷiṉa mallatu ciraiyenap paṭutaliṉṟi niṟaiperuñ celva moṭavaṉi vāḻ pallavar teliṅkar māḷavar kaliṅka kocalar kaṉṉaṭar teṉnar koṅkar cetiyar tirikarttar vaṅkaraṅkar mattirar mattirakaṅkar conakar kaiykaiyar cinaren ṟaṟai kaḻal ventarumellā varai carum muṟaimaiyil vantu tiṟai kuṇantiṟaiñca
Ampoṉ malaṟkoṭi cempiyaṉ kiḻāṉaṭi Orumaruṅkuṭaṉamarntiṉi tiruppa A[ruḷ peruccirāmaiy poṟkoṭi yimaiyap pāvaiyuñ civaṉum polac cempoṉ virasi ṅhāsanattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷi kovirājakecari panmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1vatu ciṅka nāyaṟṟu A
parapakṣattu caturdeśiyum putankiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Āyiliyattu nāḷ tiru varaṅkan tiruppatiyil tiruvāy moḻintaruḷi śrīvayiṣṇavaril parakecariceri kārimāṟa nampiyum toṭittāṇṭānum kantāṭai tirumaṅkai Āḷinampiyum tirukka ṇṭa nampiyum Iṭavai nārāyaṇa nampiyum perum puliyūr Arumāritāsarum ceñ
lūrt tiruvaraṅka dāsarum paḷḷikoṇṭān nampi Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom caṅkāḻ vānāṉa ciraṅka nātaṉukkum perumāṭi tevaṉukkum Ivarkaḷ mātākka tirunaṉtavanattukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai tirumārviṭaṅ koṇṭāṉ tirunaṉtavanattukku meṟku tenpāṟkellai tennāṟṟukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai Irāca nārāyaṇa ntirunan=tavanattukku kiḻa
kkum vaṭapāṟkellai tiruveṭṭaik keḻuntaruḷun tiruvitikkut teṟkum Icainta perunāṉkellai yuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam koyiṟkolāl kuḻi Āyiram Ikkuḻi Āyiramum tirunan=tavanañ ceykaikku viṟṟukkuṭuttom Innilam viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāka Anṟāṭu naṟponnukku ciraṅkavattanin pakkalil koṇṭa pon Irupatu Ivvirupatiṉ kaḻañ
cum Ivarkaḷ mātākkaḷ pakkal koṇṭa pon patin kaḻañcum Āka Ivarkaḷ pakkal koṇṭa pon poṉ muppatin kaḻañcuṅ koṇṭu śrī paṇ ṭāratte Oṭukki Ivarkaḷukku viṟṟuk kuṭuttom tevar tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉa śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷom . Ivarkaḷukku viṟṟuk kuṭutta tirunaṉtavanam koyil
kolāl kuḻi Āyiram Ivvāyirattukkum Ituve vilaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ cilavolai kāṭṭak kaṭavatallātatākavum Ipparicu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom caṅkāḻvārāṉa ciraṅkanātaṉukkum perumāṭi tevanukkum Ivarkaḷ mātāk
kaḷukkum tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil tiruvāy moḻintaruḷina śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷom caṅ kāḻvānāṉa ciraṅka yyum śrīvayiṣṇavar per munṟukku jivanattukku cantirātittaval palicaiyāl śrī paṇṭāratte cellakkaṭavatāka śrī paṇ ṭārattu Oṭukkina pon Eṇpatin kaḻañcu Ippon Eṇpatin kaḻañcum perumāṭi tevaṉ tirunantavaṉañ ceyyum śrīvaiyiṣṇavar Oruvarkku jīvitam cantirā tittaval śrī paṇ
ṭāratte ceyvatāka śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkina pon 3 10 Ippoṉ muppatin kaḻañcum Ivarkaḷ mātākkaḷ vayiṣṇavar Oruvarkku jivanattukku cantirātittavaṟ cellakkaṭavatānamaikku śrīpaṇṭāratte Oṭukkina pon 3 10 Ippon muppatin kaḻañcum Āka tiru nan=tavaṉañ ceyyum per Ayvarkku jivanam cantirātittavaṟ palicaiyāl celvatāka śrī paṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa pon 100 4 10
Ippon nūṟṟu nāṟpatin kaḻañcum Oṭukka koṇṭu Ittirunaṉta vanañ ceyyap paṇṇi t tiruvaraṅkat tiruppatiyil tiruvāy moḻintaruḷina śrī vayiṣṇavarkaḷom . Ippaṭikku Ivai koyiṟ kaṇakku tiruvaraṅkappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai Aṭikaḷ sajaiyātanamaikku Ivai tiruvāymoḻi Araiyaneḻuttu . Itai tiruk kiḻkaṇṭaThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 24.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
